patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by incorrect handling of the null character ('�') in the strEscape method. The current implementation appends '\0' instead of '\000'. We need to modify the case for '�' to append '\000' instead.
patches.changes:
- case '\0': sb.append("\\0"); break;
+ case '\0': sb.append("\\000"); break;
patches.diff:
- case '\0': sb.append("\\0"); break;
+ case '\0': sb.append("\\000"); break;
